action.reasoning: Observation: The current iteration failed due to a tensor size mismatch. The model is outputting 130 dimensions instead of the required 128. Looking at the model architecture, I have: temperature (60) + humidity (60) + radiation (6) + precipitation (2) + other scalars (2) = 130, but the target has only 128 dimensions. According to the task description, the output should be: ptend_t (60) + ptend_q0001 (60) + cam_out_NETSW (1) + cam_out_FLWDS (1) + cam_out_PRECSC (1) + cam_out_PRECC (1) + cam_out_SOLS, cam_out_SOLL, cam_out_SOLSD, cam_out_SOLLD (4) = 60+60+1+1+1+1+4 = 128. So I have 2 extra dimensions in my model. Analysis: I need to fix the output dimensions in the model. The radiation head is producing 6 outputs, but it should be 6 (NETSW, FLWDS, PRECSC, PRECC, SOLS, SOLL, SOLSD, SOLLD = 8 total). Wait, let me recount: NETSW (1) + FLWDS (1) + PRECSC (1) + PRECC (1) + SOLS, SOLL, SOLSD, SOLLD (4) = 8 radiation-related outputs. So I should have: temp (60) + humid (60) + radiation (8) + others (0) = 128. Actually, looking again: ptend_t (60) + ptend_q0001 (60) + cam_out_NETSW (1) + cam_out_FLWDS (1) + cam_out_PRECSC (1) + cam_out_PRECC (1) + cam_out_SOLS, cam_out_SOLL, cam_out_SOLSD, cam_out_SOLLD (4) = 60+60+1+1+1+1+4 = 128. So radiation head should output 8, not 6. And I don't need the other_scalars_head since those are included in radiation. Decision: Fix the model architecture to have the correct output dimensions: temp (60) + humid (60) + radiation/precip (8) = 128.
